mechanism_narrative: Rising real GDP growth accelerates corporate earnings expectations, driving positive equity returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in GDP contraction quarters are not significantly negative.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 0.75%, the market prices in tighter financial conditions, compressing equity valuations and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns remain positive in more than 60% of observations where FEDFUNDS exceeds 0.75% for consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in nonfarm payrolls growth and rising unemployment rates signal labor market deterioration, triggering risk-off positioning and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint PAYEMS decline and UNRATE rise fails to predict negative 60-day forward returns in more than 50% of historical instances.

mechanism_narrative: In periods of sustained industrial production expansion above trend, supply chain bottlenecks emerge, causing input cost inflation that erodes corporate margins and depresses equity valuations.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns do not decline when INDPRO exceeds 102 and CPIAUCSL rises concurrently over a 60-day window.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in housing starts reflects robust consumer confidence and credit availability, supporting positive equity market momentum over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no positive correlation with HOUST growth rates across any 12-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 4.8%, wage pressure accelerates, prompting fears of premature monetary tightening that negatively impact equity valuations.
failure_condition: Equity returns do not turn negative when UNRATE drops below 4.8% and remains there for two consecutive months.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising retail sales and falling inventory turnover indicates demand outstripping supply, leading to margin compression and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined signal of rising RSAFS and flat or falling INDPRO fails to predict negative 20-day forward returns in more than 50% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of rapid federal funds rate increases, the discount rate effect dominates earnings growth, causing sustained negative equity returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns remain positive or neutral during consecutive 3-month FEDFUNDS hikes exceeding 0.25 percentage points.
